subcodes.first_line: Blessed is the state of him whom the veils of the peoples of the world have not, on this Day, debarred from the Most Great Ocean and from recognition of the Ancient Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نیکوست حال نفسیکه امروز حجبات اهل عالم او را از بحر اعظم و عرفان مالک قدم منع
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @suffering and imprisonment
